channel.title: Xiaomi 12T Pro MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 12T Pro MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI V14.0.22.12.5.DEV Fastboot update for Redmi K50 Ultra China
item.description:
New Public Beta Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi K50 Ultra China

Codename: diting

Version: V14.0.22.12.5.DEV | 13.0

Size: 7.4 GB

MD5: 6debcd7d0a9823015832d1d813f4c06b

Changelog:
Bug fixes and system optimizations.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.VLFMIXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 12T Pro Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 12T Pro Global

Codename: diting

Version: OS3.0.3.0.VLFMIXM | 15.0

Size: 7.0 GB

MD5: f9600ec19d58029acdb72ac77406e9fb

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Improved system stability to prevent occasional app crashes
Updated the security patch to March 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
